ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" TEXT /* ID of the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" TEXT /* ID of the category of the product */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who left the review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 stars) */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes for the review */,
  "verified_purchase" TEXT /* Whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "review_headline" TEXT /* Headline of the review */,
  "review_body" TEXT /* Body of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplaces" (
  "marketplace_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each marketplace */,
  "marketplace_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketplace (e.g., US, UK) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the marketplace */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the marketplace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product being ordered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., clothing, electronics) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "brand_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand (e.g., Nike, Gildan) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_helpful_votes" (
  "review_helpful_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each helpful vote */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being voted on */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer casting the vote */,
  "vote" TEXT /* Whether the vote is helpful or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_helpful_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_helpful_votes_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_comments" (
  "review_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_orders" (
  "customer_order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketplace_products" (
  "marketplace_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketplace product */,
  "marketplace_id" TEXT /* ID of the marketplace the product is sold on */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marketplace_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_products_marketplace_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketplace_id") REFERENCES marketplaces ("marketplace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketplace_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "return_requests" (
  "return_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return request */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_return_requests_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refund_records" (
  "refund_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refund record */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order being refunded */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date the refund was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refund_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refund_records_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
